title: Mason Cash Original White 22 cm Earthenware All-Purpose Pudding Basin
features: Manufactured from durable quality earthenware - microwave, dishwasher and freezer safe
Protruding rim allows a lid to be tied and maintained throughout steaming process
Vented base allows trapped pockets of air to escape easily when steaming
Measures 12cm x 22cm x 22cm - ideal for steamed puddings and more
Mason Cash quality bakeware - the choice of the discerning baker
